name: Replicator + Booz Allen + Red Hat + Microsoft Federal + HashiCorp
summary: The integrator + cloud-federal pool owning DoD AI substrate ops: Booz Allen (Project Linchpin/aiSSEMBLE), Red Hat (OpenShift AI), Microsoft Federal (Azure Gov IL5/IL6), HashiCorp (Vault/Terraform), Replicator ORIENT/ACT vendors (Anduril, Swarm Aero, L3Harris).
killinchu_fit: Killinchu rides ON this substrate: it deploys via UDS/Zarf into OpenShift/UDS Core, signs with cosign, and adds the Lambda-gated receipt chain none of these integrators ship. Complementary governance layer, not a competitor.
hooks: Deploy into OpenShift / UDS Core via Zarf (Red Hat / Defense Unicorns substrate)
Vault-provisioned signing keys (HashiCorp) for the Khipu chain
Linchpin pipeline: Lambda governance overlay on aiSSEMBLE MLOps outputs
